item.title: Asia's weekly TOP10 crypto news: Japan Recognizes Crypto as Financial Products, South Korea Plans Tokenized Treasury Pilots, Russia Opens USDT and USDC Trading to Qualified Investors, Coinbase Opens R
item.description: pAsia's weekly TOP10 crypto news: Japan Recognizes Crypto as Financial Products, South Korea Plans Tokenized Treasury Pilots, Russia Opens USDT and USDC Trading to Qualified Investors, Coinbase Opens Registration for Chinese Users, and Bybit Launches in Indonesia./pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/me

item.title: Ethical consumption needs to be easy to identify, accessible and affordable, especially in a worsening economy. And we need to rethink what we should be optimising our economy for
item.description: pspanI don’t know anyone who wants the rainforest, which is storing carbon and biodiversity and undiscovered medicines for us all, to be burned down for their coffee, and the people harvesting it paid too little to live a dignified life./span/ppspanI don’t know anyone who wants the animals they eat

item.title: RT by @SciTechera: Xi jinping said that AI development should not be a solo performance by one country, but a symphony of international cooperation, - AI will become a new engine of global economic gr
item.description: pXi jinping said that AI development should not be a solo performance by one country, but a symphony of international cooperation,br /br /- AI will become a new engine of global economic growth and transform every industry.br /br /- China launched the World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organi

item.title: The trader who legally drained 4.426T $BONK($21.2M) from the #BONK treasury sold another 800B $BONK ($2.48M) today. 👀 Since the incident on July 6, $BONK has fallen 40%. The drainer still holds 2.4T $
item.description: pThe trader who legally drained 4.426T a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23BONK"$BONK/a($21.2M) from the a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23BONK"#BONK/a treasury sold another 800B a href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23BONK"$BONK/a ($2.48M) today. 👀br /b
